final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an Amazon white background hero product image — 6-piece fun dog wig set.

Style/medium: clean Amazon product photo, white background, photorealistic
Composition:
  centered product display
  all 6 dog wigs arranged neatly and visibly
  one wig shown worn on a cute dog model in the center for scale and context
  remaining 5 wigs displayed around the dog, flat lay or propped
Subject:
  6-piece dog wig costume set
  variety of wig styles (e.g. colorful, curly, straight, novelty shapes)
  one cute dog wearing a wig as hero focal point
Scene/backdrop: pure white background, no props, no shadows
Lighting/mood: bright, even, soft studio lighting
Color palette: white background; wigs in varied fun colors
Materials/textures: soft synthetic wig fiber texture visible
Text (verbatim):
Constraints:
  pure white (#FFFFFF) background
  all 6 pieces must be visible
  1:1 square format
Avoid: colored backgrounds, busy props, dark shadows, single wig only
